description:
Advances: specled.realized_by

Deliverable:
Three orchestrator changes: (a) wire EffectiveBinding.expand_implications/1 into collect_bindings at the per-layer extract_realized_by/1 site (subject layer + each requirement layer); (b) add post-concat dedup on the api_boundary tier flat list (Enum.uniq_by(& &1.mfa)) inside accumulate_tier; (c) add private seed_uncommitted_hashes/3 that runs before tier dispatch when commit_hashes? != false and umbrella? == false, computes hashes for tracked entries lacking committed hashes, and persists via HashStore.merge/2. Add Implementation.hashes_for_seeding/3 (@doc false) that builds the world via the existing private build_world/3 and returns %{subject.id => hash_bin} for non-dangling subjects.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: orchestrator_test.exs gains tests for (a) expand_implications wired per-layer; (b) post-concat dedup collapses subject+requirement duplicate impl entries into one api_boundary entry; (c) seed pass writes uncommitted hashes via merge/2; (d) gating respected (commit_hashes?: false skips seed); (e) dangling entries are not seeded.
- Behaviors to demonstrate: spec requirements specled.realized_by.implication_invoked_per_layer, implication_amplification_dedup, silent_seed.

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/specled_ex/realization/effective_binding.ex (S2; do not modify it here)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/canonical.ex (S3)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/api_boundary.ex (S4)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/hash_store.ex (S1; do not change merge/2 here)
- .spec/**
Allowed touches:
- lib/specled_ex/realization/orchestrator.ex
- lib/specled_ex/realization/implementation.ex (only to add hashes_for_seeding/3)
- test/specled_ex/realization/orchestrator_test.exs

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do NOT change Orchestrator.run/2's return shape (courtesy summary deferred per Q2).
- Do NOT introduce a run_with_metadata/2 wrapper.
- Do NOT add a finding code; the seed pass is silent on the seeding run.
- The post-concat dedup applies to api_boundary ONLY; impl/expanded_behavior/use/typespecs are untouched.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED
Session: eeca2123-30e1-430c-90c1-08dd23adf991
Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/eeca2123-30e1-430c-90c1-08dd23adf991.jsonl

Commit: d970d05
Stage branch: specled_-701.6/orchestrator-expand-implications-silent-seed
Stage worktree: /Users/mz/src/specled_ex-701.6 (branched off epic HEAD bf46a22 after rebase onto specled_-701.8 land)

Files touched (Allowed only):
- lib/specled_ex/realization/orchestrator.ex (+267/-18)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/implementation.ex (+32) — added hashes_for_seeding/3 (@doc false)
- test/specled_ex/realization/orchestrator_test.exs (+476/-1) — 14 new tests across 6 describe groups

Tests added:
- run/2 — expand_implications applied per-layer (3 tests)
  - subject impl entry amplifies into api_boundary tier on the same run
  - requirement-layer impl entry amplifies into api_boundary tier
  - implication-inferred dangling suppresses api_boundary dangling, keeps impl-tier dangling
- run/2 — post-concat dedup on api_boundary tier (2 tests)
  - subject + requirement both list the same impl MFA → exactly one api_boundary drift
  - implementation tier does NOT post-concat-dedup (subject impl_bindings still aggregates)
- run/2 — silent seed pass (4 tests)
  - writes api_boundary baseline for a never-seeded MFA and emits no drift
  - seed pass uses merge/2 (preserves sibling entry when drift halts the post-run refresh)
  - seeds bare-module entries under api_boundary (head-union) and implementation (full-union)
  - seeds implementation closure subject under subject.id
- run/2 — seed gating (2 tests)
  - commit_hashes?: false disables the seed pass
  - umbrella?: true skips the seed pass
- run/2 — dangling entries are not seeded (2 tests)
  - dangling MFA does not seed and surfaces a dangling finding
  - dangling MFA inside an implementation closure does not seed the subject
- run/2 — inferred? flag does not leak onto findings (1 test, property-style)

Each new test carries @tag spec: <id> for the requirement it advances.

Verification stubs flipped: NONE — .spec/** is Out of Scope for this ticket.
The execute: false stubs covering implication_invoked_per_layer +
implication_amplification_dedup + silent_seed remain false; S6/S9 will flip
them when the integration scenarios + spec doc updates land.

Spec validate (mix spec.validate) — pre-existing baseline was 7 errors / 13
warnings; current is 5 errors / 11 warnings. The 2-error / 2-warning drop is
exactly the new @tag spec: annotations advancing implication_amplification_dedup
+ silent_seed coverage. All remaining errors/warnings are S6/S7/S8 ticket
scope (dedup_realized_by_*, implication_drift_both_tiers integration scenario)
or S8-validator-induced realized_by_redundant_dup info-warnings on subjects
elsewhere in the repo — none are introduced by this commit.

Tests: mix test → 2 properties, 750 tests, 0 failures
Compile: mix compile --force --warnings-as-errors → clean

Summary: Wired EffectiveBinding.expand_implications/1 into Orchestrator.collect_bindings/1 at the per-layer extract_realized_by/1 site (subject layer + each requirement layer); inferred-by-implication api_boundary entries are tagged inferred?: true on their binding_ref so the api_boundary detector suppresses duplicate dangling findings. Added Enum.uniq_by(& &1.mfa) post-concat on the api_boundary tier flat list to collapse subject+requirement amplification. Added private seed_uncommitted_hashes/3 that runs before tier dispatch (gated by commit_hashes? != false and umbrella? == false), computes hashes for tracked entries lacking committed hashes across all five tiers (including bare-module head/full union envelopes for api_boundary/implementation), and persists via HashStore.merge/2. Dangling entries are not seeded. Added Implementation.hashes_for_seeding/3 (@doc false) that builds the world via the existing private build_world/3 and returns %{subject.id => hash_bin} for non-dangling subjects.

title: S5: Orchestrator wiring (expand_implications + silent seed)
